originalTitle: SpaceX just filed for what could be the biggest IPO ever
summary: Elon Musk's final frontier is officially open for business now that SpaceX has formally filed its S-1 prospectus with the SEC. That kicks off what could be the largest initial public offering ever when it lists on the Nasdaq stock exchange with the ticker SPCX. SpaceX generated $18.67 billion in revenue in 2025, driven largely […]
content: Elon Musk's final frontier is officially open for business now that SpaceX has formally filed its S-1 prospectus with the SEC. chineseTitle: SpaceX 刚刚申请了可能是有史以来规模最大的 IPO
chineseSummary: 随着 SpaceX 向 SEC 正式提交 S-1 招股说明书，埃隆·马斯克的最后一个领域正式开放。当该公司在纳斯达克证券交易所上市（股票代码为 SPCX）时，这可能是有史以来规模最大的首次公开募股。 SpaceX 在 2025 年创造了 186.7 亿美元的收入，这主要是 […]

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
